calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-30-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2009 Set For Order To Show Cause On Dec-14-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-17-2009 Continued To Oct-16-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-25-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Fred G. Meis, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Arun Sharma, doing business as Flight Plan Solutions.
No appearance by defendant Leonard K. Dykstra, a/k/a Lenny Dykstra as an individual and doing business as the Players Club Magazine.
Default was entered against defendant Leonard K. Dykstra, a/k/a Lenny Dykstra as an individual and doing business as the Players Club Magazine.
Dismissals without prejudice were entered against defendants the Players Club Magazine, LLC and Does 1 thru 100, Inclusive, on August 10, 2009.
No dismissal as to defendant Players Club Sports Enterprises, LLC has been entered as of today's date.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Arun Sharma, doing business as Flight Plan Solutions, and against the Defaulted Defendant Leonard K. Dykstra, a/k/a Lenny Dykstra as an individual and doing business as the Players Club Magazine, as follows:

Damages/Principal - 70,842.09.
Prejudgment Interest $4,172.89.
Costs - $996.42, for a total judgment in the amount of $76,011.40.

Furthermore, the Court issued a finding that defendant Leonard K. Dykstra, a/k/a Lenny Dykstra as an individual and doing business as the Players Club Magazine, engaged in a course of conduct of intentional misrepresentation.

Counsel shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than August 28, 2009.
